item.title: jaylfc/taOS
item.description: Self-hosted AI agent OS. Your memory, chat, agents, and files stay on hardware you own, offline by default, cloud by choice. Offline AI memory (taOSmd), self-hosted multi-framework group chat, a full

item.title: langchain-ai/docs
item.description: Unified LangChain documentation.

item.title: Kaden-Schutt/hipfire
item.description: RDNA-native LLM inference engine in Rust.

item.title: lightseekorg/smg
item.description: Engine-agnostic LLM gateway in Rust. Full OpenAI & Anthropic API compatibility across vLLM, TRT-LLM, TokenSpeed, SGLang, OpenAI, Gemini & more. Industry-first gRPC pipeline, KV cache-aware routing, ch

item.title: h5i-dev/h5i
item.description: Auditable workspaces for AI coding agents: sandboxed worktrees, conflict-free multi-agent orchestra, 95% lower token waste, and persistent memory.

item.title: mnemon-dev/mnemon
item.description: LLM-supervised persistent memory for AI agents — graph-based recall, cross-session knowledge, single binary. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, and any CLI agent.

item.title: Arvo-AI/aurora
item.description: Aurora — Open source AI-powered agentic incident management & root cause analysis for SREs. LangGraph agents investigate across AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes. Integrates with PagerDuty, Datadog, Grafana

item.title: expectedparrot/edsl
item.description: Design, conduct and analyze results of AI-powered surveys and experiments. Simulate social science and market research with large numbers of AI agents and LLMs.

item.title: guqiong96/Lvllm
item.description: LvLLM is a special NUMA extension of vllm that makes full use of CPU and memory resources, reduces GPU memory requirements, and features an efficient GPU parallel and NUMA parallel architecture, suppo

item.title: rodrigo-arenas/Sklearn-genetic-opt
item.description: Hyperparameter optimization and feature selection for scikit-learn using evolutionary algorithms. A modern alternative to GridSearchCV and RandomizedSearchCV.

item.title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
item.description: The open creative AI workspace

item.title: Justin0504/Aegis
item.description: Runtime policy enforcement for AI agents. Cryptographic audit trail, human-in-the-loop approvals, kill switch. Zero code changes.

item.title: timmyy123/LLM-Hub
item.description: Local AI Assistant on your phone

item.title: GlitterKill/sdl-mcp
item.description: Symbol Delta Ledger (SDL-MCP) is a policy-centered context budget layer for coding agents: Symbol-graph intelligence combined with precision tools. It turns sprawling codebases into compact, high-sig

item.title: ome-projects/ome
item.description: Open Model Engine (OME) — Kubernetes operator for LLM serving, GPU scheduling, and model lifecycle management. Works with SGLang, vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, and Triton

item.title: exograph/exograph
item.description: Build production-ready backends in minutes

item.title: huawei-csl/KVarN
item.description: KVarN is a native vLLM KV-cache quantization backend for your agents: 3-5x more context, throughput above FP16, and FP16-level accuracy. Calibration-free, one flag.

item.title: buildingjoshbetter/TrueMemory
item.description: The memory your AI should have had from the start. Automatic capture, automatic recall, 100% local. One SQLite file, zero cloud. Works with Claude Code, Claude CLI, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI.

item.title: NPC-Worldwide/incognide
item.description: Explore the unknown, build the future, own your data.

item.title: runpod-workers/worker-vllm
item.description: The Runpod worker template for serving our large language model endpoints. Powered by vLLM.

item.title: GizClaw/flowcraft
item.description: Production-grade Go SDK for building AI agents with long-term memory, knowledge retrieval, and voice — runnable as a library, a daemon, or a real-time pipeline.

item.title: open-edge-platform/geti_v2
item.description: Build computer vision models in a fraction of the time and with less data.

item.title: secureagentics/Adrian
item.description: Open-source runtime AI agent security tool - monitors and controls AI agents, catching malicious tool use, prompt injection, and policy drift in real time, before the agent acts.

item.title: brontoguana/krasis
item.description: Krasis is a Hybrid LLM runtime which focuses on efficient running of larger models on consumer grade VRAM limited hardware

item.title: spark-arena/sparkrun
item.description: sparkrun - launch, manage, and stop LLM inference workloads on NVIDIA DGX Spark systems

item.title: meilisearch/meilisearch-dotnet
item.description: .NET client for Meilisearch

item.title: BBC-Esq/VectorDB-Plugin
item.description: Program that lets you ask questions about your documents, audio, and video files.

item.title: cordum-io/cordum
item.description: The open agent control plane. Govern autonomous AI agents with pre-execution policy enforcement, approval gates, and audit trails. Works with LangChain, CrewAI, MCP, and any framework.

item.title: RMA-MUN/RAGNotebook
item.description: 基于LangChain、FastAPI和React的RAG项目，主分支为基于RAG的智能笔记助手，base-rag分支为开箱即用的基础RAG项目供学习使用

item.title: zilliztech/knowhere
item.description: Vector search engine inside Milvus, integrating FAISS, HNSW, DiskANN.
